steps.title: Find the key transition point
steps.content: The passage establishes that by the 2019 parade, the original ticker tape had long since been retired. The blank introduces what happened next — what took its place.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
The logical relationship is sequence. The blank needs a transition signaling what happened after the original ticker tape was retired.
  • Choice A — ‘In other words,’: signals a restatement, but shredded paper replacing ticker tape is a new fact, not a rewording of the retirement. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘With this in mind,’: signals that what follows is done in consideration of the previous point, implying an intentional decision — but the passage doesn't frame shredded paper as a deliberate response to the retirement. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘In addition,’: signals an extra supporting point, but shredded paper didn't supplement original ticker tape — it replaced it. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Then,’: signals the next event in a sequence, so fits — once ticker tape was retired, shredded standard paper took over for the 2019 celebration. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
